name: Jason Bridges
bio: Jason Bridges serves as the Nacogdoches County Sheriff, protecting the oldest town in Texas and the surrounding county. Sheriff Bridges oversees a full-service law enforcement agency providing patrol, investigations, and detention services to Nacogdoches County.
campaignPromises: Enhance campus safety coordination with Stephen F. Austin State University
Expand narcotics task force operations in Nacogdoches County
Improve deputy retention through competitive compensation
Modernize records management and reporting systems
Increase community policing in underserved areas of the county
